user_message: Just got this from Robert Foster at Quantum Analytics -- I need help figuring out renewal risk. This is time-sensitive -- customer is waiting.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-18 09:18 EST
Subject: Follow-up: renewal risk Review

Just checking in on the renewal risk proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
Date: 2024-01-20 12:25 EST
Subject: Follow-up: renewal risk Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with renewal risk. What are the next steps from your side?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Quantum Analytics: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF39-B trap (Conflates discussion with decision); produces complete Consolidated decision log, cross-thread commitment inventory, action list with thread attribution, M
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF39-B failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF39-B failure mode (Conflates discussion with decision)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct renewal risk decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF39-B -- Conflates discussion with decision
